name: ai-firehose-mcp
description: MCP server for AI Firehose (ai-firehose.com): query the bleeding edge of AI from any MCP client. Semantic search, breakout trends, glossary, and corpus stats over a rolling quarter of AI developments. Wraps the public ai-firehose.com API, so it needs no repository, no API keys, and no local data.
author: Eric Allione
